title: ConsolidationMutationManifest (v1)
description: Signed owner-facing commitment to the exact formed/refined mutations of a consolidation cycle, joined to its counts-only ConsolidationReceipt by receipt_id + receipt_digest. Commits per-mutation content digests (never content), so a surface can prove displayed sentences are the signed cycle's mutations. Local-only this version. See spec/consolidation-mutation-manifest-v1.md.

manifest_type.description: Domain-separation discriminator inside the signed body — a receipt signature can never verify as a manifest. Distinct from the ContentArtifactType `artifact_type` registry; a manifest is not a content artifact.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version, independent of the receipt's.

motebit_id.description: Signer's MotebitId — the motebit that performed the cycle.

cycle_id.description: The cycle whose mutations this commits to — matches the receipt and the consolidation_cycle_run event.

receipt_id.description: The EXACT ConsolidationReceipt this supplements — not merely a reusable cycle id.

receipt_digest.description: Canonical SHA-256 (hex) of the signed ConsolidationReceipt body. A regenerated/substituted receipt breaks the link.

node_id.description: The formed/refined memory node this commitment covers (opaque UUID, not authority).

kind.description: Creation vs modification — committed so a relabel breaks the signature.

content_sha256.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the node's content at formation. Commits to the exact displayed sentence WITHOUT carrying it (one-way). Local-only today; a keyed/salted commitment is the export-triggered follow-up.

provenance.description: Provenance of the formed node, committed so a taught↔inferred relabel breaks the signature. Emitter-authored (docs/doctrine/memory-provenance.md).

sensitivity.description: Sensitivity tier of the formed node, committed so a downgrade (which would loosen the felt-surface disclosure ceiling) breaks the signature.

mutations.description: Commitments to the cycle's formed/refined mutations, ordered by node_id for deterministic canonicalization.

created_at.description: Formation time — milliseconds since Unix epoch.

public_key.description: Hex Ed25519 public key of the signer, embedded for portable verification.

suite.description: Cryptosuite — the same JCS+Ed25519+base64url recipe as the receipt family; domain separation is by manifest_type, not a distinct suite.
